description.zh: 下載安裝 Node.js v20 以上版本，裝完跑一下驗證指令確認成功。
description.en: Download and install Node.js v20+, then run the verify command to confirm.

steps.code:
# 用 Homebrew 安裝（推薦）
brew install node

# 或用 nvm（可管理多版本）
curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.40.1/install.sh | bash
nvm install 20

# 驗證安裝
node -v
npm -v

note.zh: 需要 Node.js v20 以上，建議用 nvm 管理版本。
note.en: Requires Node.js v20+. We recommend nvm for version management.

description.zh: 三種安裝方式任選一種。新手建議用一鍵安裝。
description.en: Choose one of three installation methods. One-click install is recommended for beginners.

docker.code:
docker pull anthropic/claude-code
docker run -it anthropic/claude-code

note.zh: npm 方式遇到權限問題可用 sudo，或改用 nvm 避免權限問題。
note.en: If npm gives permission errors, use sudo or switch to nvm to avoid permission issues.

description.zh: 設定你的 AI 提供者和 API Key。支援多家 AI 服務。
description.en: Configure your AI provider and API Key. Multiple AI services are supported.

steps.code:
# 以 Anthropic Claude 為例
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="your-api-key-here"

# 永久生效（加到 shell 設定檔）
echo 'export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="your-api-key-here"' >> ~/.zshrc
source ~/.zshrc

note.zh: 把 your-api-key-here 換成你的 Key。不同提供者的環境變數名稱不同。
note.en: Replace your-api-key-here with your key. Different providers use different env var names.

description.zh: 進到專案目錄，讓 Claude 掃描你的程式碼結構。它會自動生成 CLAUDE.md — 這是一份告訴 Claude「你的專案長怎樣、該怎麼幫你」的設定檔，有了它 Claude 才能精準回答。
description.en: Enter your project directory and let Claude scan your code. It auto-generates CLAUDE.md — a config file that tells Claude about your project structure and how to help you. This makes Claude's responses much more accurate.

steps.code:
cd your-project-folder
claude

# Claude 會自動生成 CLAUDE.md

note.zh: 這步可選但強烈建議。沒有 CLAUDE.md，Claude 就像不認識你專案的新人。
note.en: Optional but strongly recommended. Without CLAUDE.md, Claude is like a new teammate who doesn't know your project.

description.zh: 前往 HunterKit Skills 目錄（/skills）挑選你需要的工具，一行指令安裝。
description.en: Head to the HunterKit Skills directory (/skills) to pick the tools you need, then install with one command.

steps.code:
# 安裝單個 Skill
claude mcp add skill-name

# 範例：安裝 Binance Skills Hub
claude mcp add binance-skills-hub

note.zh: 到 HunterKit 的 Skills 目錄（/skills）查看全部 152+ 可用的 Skills，有分類和搜尋。
note.en: Visit HunterKit's Skills directory (/skills) to browse all 152+ available Skills with categories and search.

description.zh: 兩種使用方式：終端機 CLI 或 Web 控制台。
description.en: Two ways to use: terminal CLI or Web console.

steps.code:
# 終端機 CLI（直接對話）
claude

# 帶任務啟動
claude "幫我查一下 BTC 現在的價格"

note.zh: 輸入 /help 查看所有可用指令。
note.en: Type /help to see all available commands.

description.zh: 從官網下載安裝檔，或用 winget 一行搞定。
description.en: Download from the official website, or use winget for a one-liner.

steps.code:
# 用 winget 安裝（推薦）
winget install OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS

# 或從官網下載：https://nodejs.org

# 重新開啟終端機後驗證
node -v
npm -v

note.zh: 安裝完後必須重新開啟終端機，讓 PATH 生效。
note.en: You must restart your terminal after installation for PATH to take effect.

description.zh: 打開 PowerShell 或 Windows Terminal，三種方式任選。
description.en: Open PowerShell or Windows Terminal, choose one of three methods.

docker.code:
docker pull anthropic/claude-code
docker run -it anthropic/claude-code

note.zh: 遇到權限問題，用系統管理員身分開啟終端機。
note.en: If you get permission errors, run the terminal as Administrator.

description.zh: 設定 AI 提供者的 API Key 為環境變數。
description.en: Set your AI provider's API Key as an environment variable.

steps.code:
# PowerShell（當前 session）
$env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY = "your-api-key-here"

# 永久設定
[System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY', 'your-api-key-here', 'User')

note.zh: 永久設定後需重新開啟終端機。

description.zh: 進到專案目錄，啟動 Claude 自動掃描程式碼。
description.en: Navigate to your project directory and let Claude auto-scan your code.

note.zh: 建議用 Windows Terminal 或 VS Code 內建終端機。
note.en: We recommend Windows Terminal or VS Code's built-in terminal.

description.zh: 挑選你需要的 Skills 安裝。
description.en: Pick and install the Skills you need.

steps.code:
claude mcp add skill-name

# 範例
claude mcp add binance-skills-hub

description.zh: 在終端機裡直接跟 Claude 對話。
description.en: Chat with Claude directly in your terminal.

steps.code:
claude

# 或帶任務啟動
claude "review this project for security issues"

note.zh: 輸入 /help 查看所有指令。

description.zh: 用 nvm 安裝最彈性，也可以用系統套件管理器。
description.en: nvm is the most flexible. You can also use your system package manager.

steps.code:
# 用 nvm（推薦）
curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.40.1/install.sh | bash
source ~/.bashrc
nvm install 20

# 或用 apt（Ubuntu/Debian）
sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y nodejs npm

# 驗證
node -v
npm -v

note.zh: apt 裝的版本可能太舊，建議用 nvm 確保 v20+。
note.en: apt may install an older version. Use nvm to ensure v20+.

description.zh: 三種安裝方式，新手建議一鍵安裝。
description.en: Three installation methods. One-click is recommended for beginners.

docker.code:
docker pull anthropic/claude-code
docker run -it anthropic/claude-code

note.zh: 遇到 EACCES 權限錯誤，不要用 sudo npm。改用 nvm 或修正 npm 權限。
note.en: If you get EACCES errors, don't use sudo npm. Use nvm or fix npm permissions instead.

description.zh: 設定 API Key 到 shell 設定檔，支援多家 AI 提供者。
description.en: Set your API Key in your shell config. Multiple AI providers supported.

steps.code:
# Bash
echo 'export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="your-api-key-here"' >> ~/.bashrc
source ~/.bashrc

# Zsh
echo 'export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="your-api-key-here"' >> ~/.zshrc
source ~/.zshrc

description.zh: 進到專案目錄，Claude 會自動掃描並生成 CLAUDE.md。
description.en: Enter your project directory. Claude auto-scans and generates CLAUDE.md.

description.zh: 從目錄挑選 Skills 安裝。
description.en: Pick and install Skills from the directory.

steps.code:
claude mcp add skill-name

# 範例
claude mcp add binance-skills-hub

claude

claude "explain the architecture of this project"

note.zh: 輸入 /help 查看完整指令列表。
note.en: Type /help for the full command list.

question.zh: 遇到權限問題怎麼解決？

answer.zh: macOS/Linux：用 nvm 安裝 Node.js 可以避免大部分權限問題。絕對不要用 sudo npm install -g。Windows：用系統管理員身分開啟終端機。
answer.en: macOS/Linux: Install Node.js via nvm to avoid most permission issues. Never use sudo npm install -g. Windows: Run terminal as Administrator.

question.en: npm install is stuck, what do I do?

answer.zh: 先試切換 npm 鏡像源：npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com。如果還是卡住，清除快取再重試：npm cache clean --force && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
answer.en: Try switching npm registry: npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com. If still stuck, clear cache and retry: npm cache clean --force && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code

answer.zh: sharp 是圖片處理套件，有時需要系統級依賴。macOS：brew install vips。Ubuntu：sudo apt install libvips-dev。或直接跳過：npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code --ignore-scripts
answer.en: sharp is an image processing package that sometimes needs system dependencies. macOS: brew install vips. Ubuntu: sudo apt install libvips-dev. Or skip it: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code --ignore-scripts

question.en: How do I get an API Key?

answer.zh: 到你選擇的 AI 提供者官網註冊：Anthropic → console.anthropic.com、OpenAI → platform.openai.com、DeepSeek → platform.deepseek.com。註冊後到 API Keys 頁面建立。大部分有免費額度可以試用。
answer.en: Register at your chosen AI provider: Anthropic → console.anthropic.com, OpenAI → platform.openai.com, DeepSeek → platform.deepseek.com. After registration, go to the API Keys page to create one. Most offer free credits to get started.

answer.zh: PowerShell 預設會攔截腳本執行。用系統管理員身分開啟 PowerShell，執行：Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope CurrentUser。這樣就能正常跑安裝腳本了。
answer.en: PowerShell blocks script execution by default. Open PowerShell as Administrator and run: Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope CurrentUser. This allows installation scripts to run.

answer.zh: 如果 Web 控制台啟動時端口被占用，可以指定其他端口：claude --port 3001。或先找出占用端口的程序：macOS/Linux 用 lsof -i :3000，Windows 用 netstat -ano | findstr :3000。
answer.en: If the Web console port is taken, specify another: claude --port 3001. To find what's using the port: macOS/Linux use lsof -i :3000, Windows use netstat -ano | findstr :3000.
